title: Grilled Satay Steak with Malaysian Peanut Sauce
description: A fusion of Malaysian and Western flavors, this grilled steak dish is served with a creamy peanut sauce and crispy satay.
instructions: Season the steak with salt and pepper on both sides.
Grill the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steak to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the peanut butter, satay sauce, and coconut milk until smooth.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until thickened.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional minute.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve with the peanut sauce and garnish with cilantro or scallions.
